annotations.text: 30 lb shell spinner with 1.5× shuffler weight bonus — 45 lb total
CNC-machined from a monolithic 4140 steel billet — no welds, no weld failures
Sharpened AR600 toothicanes with integrated pockets — loads transfer into shell body, not fastener shear
Friction-drive system — two weapon wheels ride an internal track machined into the shell
570 Kv motor producing ~1.2 in bite depth at 6 ft/s ground speed
3:1 right-angle bevel gear reduction — up from 2:1, dramatically more pushing power
Modular shuffler pods — self-contained units, field-swappable in ~15 minutes
Two independent circuits — drive and weapon — each with dual batteries in series
3D-printed enclosures with dedicated battery slots and wire-routing channels
